name: Jubilee Sport and Recreation Centre-Badminton Court A
description: Professional PVC sports flooring with 6 international standard courts. Equipped with shadowless LED lighting.
usage_guidelines: Non-marking sports shoes are mandatory. Payment must be confirmed before entry. A typed digital signature is required for the safety waiver.

name: Jubilee Sport and Recreation Centre-Basketball Court
description: Premium maple hardwood court with professional-grade hoops and electronic scoreboards. Climate-controlled environment.
usage_guidelines: No food or colored drinks allowed on the court. Please arrive 15 minutes early for check-in. Wet-ink signature required for team tournament applications.

name: Jubilee Sport and Recreation Centre-Swimming Pool
description: Olympic-sized 50m heated pool with 8 lanes. Features advanced UV water purification and spectator seating.
usage_guidelines: Swim caps and proper swimwear are strictly required. Showering is mandatory before entering the pool. Children must be accompanied by an adult.
location: Jubilee Sports Centre University of, University Rd, Highfield, Southampton SO17 1BJ

name: WoodmillOutdoorCentre-Soccer field
description: Full-size 11-a-side outdoor pitch with high-quality synthetic turf and floodlights for night matches.
usage_guidelines: Only turf shoes or molded cleats allowed (no metal spikes). Booking is only valid after the 'Payment Received' status is shown in the app.

name: Portswood Lawn Tennis Club
description: Standard hard court with windbreaks and professional net systems. High-visibility ball boy areas provided.
usage_guidelines: Maximum of 4 players per court. Please cancel at least 24 hours in advance to receive a full refund. Digital signature accepted for term-time bookings.
